overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a hooded character with a shield walking through the ancient Egyptian city of Alexandria at night. The character navigates through narrow market alleys covered with fabric canopies, emerges into open plazas with classical columns, and ascends stone staircases while torchlight illuminates the historic stone architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market alley with fabric canopies overhead

events.description: character begins following an NPC in a red tunic walking ahead
passing a group of children standing on the right side of the alley

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow covered alley, following an NPC guide through the market

notable_agents.action: NPC in red tunic walking ahead, leading the way through the covered alley

entered.detail: blue and beige fabric awnings stretched between buildings covering the alley
large metal bowl with flames providing warm illumination
wicker baskets filled with apples and pomegranates on the ground
ancient stone walls with weathered textures and wooden doors

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow covered market alley in ancient Alexandria, with fabric canopies overhead and fruit stalls lining the path. Following an NPC in a red tunic, the character passes a group of children while fire braziers cast warm light on the cobblestone ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with classical columns and market stalls

events.description: exits covered alley into open plaza with classical architecture and columns
character turns slightly right to navigate around market stalls

agents.ego_description: walking through open plaza area, passing classical buildings with stone columns and potted plants

notable_agents.action: group of children in white and green tunics standing near a building entrance

entered.detail: white stone columns supporting a building portico with red trim
wooden structure with fabric awning displaying goods
large decorative ceramic pots with palm fronds

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered alley, the scene opens into a torch-lit plaza with classical architecture. The character passes a building with white columns and red trim, navigating around wooden market stalls while a group of children stands near the entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding street with braziers and fabric market stalls

events.description: character turns right at an intersection, passing a wooden cart
approaching a wide stone staircase leading upward to elevated streets

agents.ego_description: navigating through winding cobblestone streets, turning corners and passing lit braziers

notable_agents.action: pedestrian carrying a large bundle walking in the opposite direction

entered.detail: wooden wheeled cart parked against a building wall
wide stone stairs leading up to a higher elevation street

segments.scene_description: The character continues through winding streets illuminated by multiple fire braziers, passing a wooden cart and navigating around corners. The stone staircase leading upward becomes visible in the distance as the character approaches the elevated section of the city.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway with ornate buildings and stairs

events.description: character begins ascending the wide stone staircase
character looks upward at a tall building facade while continuing to walk

agents.ego_description: climbing stone stairs and walking along an elevated pathway, observing the architecture above

entered.detail: two-story building with distinctive blue painted trim around windows and doors
red triangular fabric awning extending from a building facade
tall stone structures visible at the higher elevation

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the stone stairs to an elevated walkway, passing a building with distinctive blue trim and red awnings. At the top, the character continues along the upper level street and looks up at the tall building facades rising above.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the intimate confines of a covered market alley into the expansive openness of a torch-lit city plaza. It begins by trailing a character and an NPC in a red tunic through a narrow passage, where fabric canopies overhead and fruit stalls create a sense of enclosure under the warm glow of fire braziers. As the character passes a group of children on the cobblestones, the scene opens and expands, transitioning from the shadowed alleyway into a wide public square. The camera then glides past wooden market stalls and toward a grand building featuring white columns and red trim, finally revealing the full scale of the classical architecture illuminated by flickering torches.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through winding city streets that gradually ascend toward an elevated urban district. It begins by following the character through narrow alleys illuminated by fire braziers, passing a wooden cart as the path curves around stone corners. As the character advances, the view opens to reveal a stone staircase leading upward, which the camera then follows to a higher walkway. The scene shifts past a building accented with blue trim and red awnings before continuing along the upper level, finally tilting upward to reveal the towering facades of the surrounding architecture.
